name: Mini Zucchini Souffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ends off each zucchini with a zester or peeler.
2. Slice the zucchinis into 3/4-inch thick rounds.
3. Scoop out the center of each round to create a cup.
4. Steam the zucchini cups until almost tender, then drain and cool.
5. Heat the butter in a small skillet.
6. Whisk together flour and form a blonde roux.
7. Gradually whisk in milk, heating until thickened.
8. Remove from heat and whisk in egg yolk, cheddar, mustard, salt, and pepper.
9. Gently fold in the egg whites.
10. Fill each zucchini cup with the batter, filling to the top.
11. Place the baking sheet on the top rack of the oven.
12. Bake at 425°F for 5-8 minutes, until puffed and golden.
13. Serve immediately.
